title: rubus cruentatus
intro: Rubus cruentatus, also known as the 'Blood-red Raspberry' or 'Blood Raspberry', is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, known for its distinctive red-purple stems and leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus cruentatus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of Rubus cruentatus may include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
